我，最擅长破局。
林默捏紧现场照片，后颈泛起凉意：三起凶案的死亡方式，与报纸上十五年前的旧闻分毫不差。
更诡异的是，他父亲当年失踪前，也攥着同一份泛黄的37版剪报。
当跨国间谍的密码在尸斑里显形，刑警队长终于明白——这场猎杀，从他戴上警徽那天，就已瞄准了他。"","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o18d66f7f2b6e03f366cddadf6d45663e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"麦秸垛里躲猫猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7506771959502343193","book_name":"第37号凶案现场","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":506,"name":"神探","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=506&name=神探&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":518,"name":"特工","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=518&name=特工&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7506772029647880729","read_count":"157","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1338845"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"409","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,都市,神探,特工,破案,推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o18d66f7f2b6e03f366cddadf6d45663e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779257735&x-signature=lyl5BkCTYYiktXK3%2FQm%2FAdQTp80%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"101565557440","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"13"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321141535EBB923C451F2338E0
